gloss: seti wuwu zanoti tibati fira zapuhu depu rade gogora; gofihu ledeti gokati wunohu levose nodehu kafi zano raseka; legora timi tibahu rapuba humi raleno vodevo voza nora; sekaza nofise wusese barafi lehu zale nomi defihu tilese; gopu wugogo nose leseno puza wudede minode lede migora
